name: Test 11 - Verify Cart Persistence After Refresh
description: Add a product, refresh the page and verify the cart still contains the item

steps.name: Ensure cart is clean before starting test
Check if cart is empty via badge

parameters.name: element
parameters.value: <Locator frame=<Frame name= url='https://react-shopping-cart-67954.firebaseapp.com/'> selector="[class^='sc-11uohgb-0'] >> [title='remove product from cart'] >> nth=0">
